data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「If there's somewhere you want to go, let me know anytime... If it's in Hyakkiyako, I can guide you there.」&「Sensei! Welcome to the festival! It's a bit embarrassing, but... I hope you like it.」

data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 10/14 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Tsubaki (Guide), 3★ Umika
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 10/14 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 10/21 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
